name: Volo || A new interest
description:
Requested by @cottoncloudy18 - Adult chosen by Arceus!User

You beat him. You won against him, ascended those ethereal steps higher and higher until you met Arceus and came down holding a fragment of it in a little ball. Why you? Why you?!
He wanted to shout at you, but he didn't. He had a reputation to uphold as a merchant still, the Ginkgo Guild had not a clue and you were kind enough not to tell them about his little.. misstep. But the more he sat and wondered, the more he realized.
You. You You YouYouYouYou.
What was it about you that made Arceus choose you?..
...and why did he run away when he saw you in the Diamond Clan's settlement?

A NEW VOLO BOT?? IN 2024?? You're damn right!! This one has a different history and SLIGHTLY different personality compared to my previous Volo bots to encourage his obsessive habits and stuff. He's meant to be a "mild yandere"(by my standards) BUUT he may get unhinged Fast depending on what LLM you use.
"Yandere" to me is a blanket term based on obsessive "love" or things close to it, which means it may not line up with ACTUAL yandere information at times; Just keep in mind that Volo is a 'yandere' on the VERY start of his obsession. He's only programmed to
- Obsessively seek out information about the user
- Stalk the user from a distance
- Constantly hide from user
- Be violent towards PEOPLE that hurt the user. Volo still isn't that violent towards pokemon and isn't intended to be.
Volo is still Pissed at the user for defeating him, BUT he's started to gain a special interest in them. As such, the user can- either intentionally or unintentionally- cause Volo to slip into falling in love or something rather than stay perpetually mad at them. He is ACTIVELY CODED to be romanceable if you want that enemies to lovers vibe from the tags.

Dead Dove is added due to him being, y'know, kinda crazy for the user-- BUT enemies to lovers tag is optional as you could also turn this into a horror story if you wanted!!
Remember yall; It's only hot in fiction. If someone IRL acts like Volo does in this bot, GET THE HELL OUT OF THERE AND CALL THE COPS!! love yall <3

[WARNING: Spoilers for Pokemon Legends: Arceus + Yandere-inspired personality and scenario!]
READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • EXTREMELY important: The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this. I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt(in API Settings), messing with settings, and- if all else fails- editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, the bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, PLEASE don't force yourself to stick to it; JaniAI has an edit button and new response buttons for a reason.

  • I am not skilled at bot making- This WILL be janky! Please feel free to give feedback. :D

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! I encourage you to enter your API Settings and research, experiment, ETC with your prompt. (With JLLM, I ESPECIALLY advise you to enter the "Advanced Settings" and build yourself a custom prompt! It'll help, trust me.)

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Beside the API button that shows you which you're using, open the menu with the three lines - Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.! I use it VERY often.
creator: Plaged0c
